calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticai Perez.
Thomas Caudill, Esq. for Plaintiff: 1355 Market Street, Associations, L.P. dba San Francisco Mart.
Plaintiff's witness: Ray Babcock, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Blackhawk Furniture, Inc., a California corporation as follows:
Damages $74,926.64
Prejudgment Interest $1,165.72
Attorney's Fees $1,530.00
Costs $441.50 for a total of $78,063.86
Judgment signed in open court.
